address_text: Jl. Clifftop Area, Uluwatu, Pecatu, Badung, Bali, Indonesia (Exact address to be confirmed)
primary_visual_identity: Boutique villa resort with infinity pool villas, coconut and frangipani trees, private cliff-side setting
price_summary_text: Estimated ~1000 CNY per room based on real event. Pricing varies by villa type and season. Must book entire villa minimum.
backup_space_description: Open-air settings with limited indoor alternatives. Interior villa spaces available but not designed for events.
backup_quality_notes: Limited rain backup infrastructure. Most dining/ceremony is outdoor. Weather contingency planning essential.
weather_exposure_notes: Open-air villas and poolside settings fully exposed to Bali weather including wind and rain from cliff location.
transport_notes: Approximately 15 minutes drive from Alila, Bvlgari, and Six Senses. 1 hour from airport. Remote cliff location requires shuttle coordination.
onsite_room_inventory_notes: 17 villas total, 30 rooms. Private villa accommodations with pool. Can accommodate group buyouts.
nearby_accommodation_notes: Limited nearby alternatives. Most guests stay on-site. Nearby: Alila, Bvlgari, Six Senses.
guest_mobility_notes: Villa locations on cliff with stairs and varied terrain. May challenge elderly guests. Multi-level buildings.
noise_cutoff_notes: Dinner events conclude by 10 PM. Music/party activities likely restricted to villa areas.
external_vendor_policy: Unknown - confirm decoration, catering, and vendor approval policies separately
minimum_stay_requirement_notes: Villa buyout requires minimum stay commitment for all rooms
minimum_spend_notes: Full villa buyout required, no partial room bookings for events
drone_policy_notes: Cliff location and privacy - drone policy unknown, should confirm in advance
family_child_notes: Private villa setting suitable for family groups. Cliff and pool areas require supervision.
religious_or_space_use_notes: No dedicated ceremony space mentioned. Event spaces are villa and pool areas.
operational_constraints_notes: Remote location, full villa buyout requirement, limited backup plans. Suitable for committed group events.
best_for: Group events 20-50 people wanting private villa experience
Dinner celebrations with accommodation at pool villas
Events prioritizing privacy and intimate group atmosphere
not_ideal_for: Couples seeking traditional ceremony + grand reception
Events requiring extensive indoor backup due to weather
Guests requiring flat, easily accessible terrain
key_strengths: Private villa setting with pool infrastructure
Close to other major venues for guest options
（小紅書用戶實測）位置：烏魯瓦圖懸崖區，距Alila、Six Senses、The Edge、酒莊均在15分鐘車程內
（小紅書用戶實測）無邊泳池面海、椰樹和黃花夾竹桃（招牌視覺）環繞
（小紅書用戶實測）盲盒預訂大成功（隨機選房型效果驚喜）
（小紅書用戶實測）賓客對場地大為驚豔
key_risks: （小紅書用戶實測）完全包棟制度，彈性較低，適合確定人數的小型婚禮
偏遠懸崖位置，交通需事先安排
戶外場地，缺乏完整室內備用方案，雨季需謹慎評估
對外供應商政策尚不明確，建議直接向酒店確認
定價資訊主要來自社群媒體，需向酒店索取正式報價
open_questions: Exact physical address and precise location relative to other venues
Complete pricing structure and package options
Rain backup plan and indoor alternatives
External vendor policies (decoration, catering, music, photographers)
